description_long: This kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular main structure and an open service window at the front. The kiosk is set on a raised tiled platform with steps leading up, surrounded by a white railing. Two large beige umbrellas provide shade for outdoor seating areas, which include wooden benches and tables. Decorative potted plants and a classic black street lamp add to the urban ambiance. The kiosk's main structure is solid and windowless except for the service opening, and the roof is flat and unadorned. The overall color palette is neutral, with shades of beige, gray, and white dominating the scene.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat roof, open service window, outdoor seating under umbrellas, and decorative plants on a raised tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open service window, two large umbrellas with seating, potted plants, and steps leading up to the platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the umbrellas, benches, and the street lamp, with the service window visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid, windowless back of the kiosk and partial views of the umbrellas and plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open service window, interior shelving, umbrellas, and the street lamp.
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular service window at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, solid, no visible overhangs or decorative elements
